stemHtml: A crew is flying an RNP approach using GNSS, and the navigation display shows a value called the Estimated Position Error (EPE). What is the EPE?

options.a: The distance between the GNSS position and calculated actual position.
options.b: The correction applied to position when using an augmentation system.
options.c: A value calculated by using a statistical model of position error probabilities.
options.d: An error calculated in the control segment and broadcast on the navigation message.
